summary: Camera gallery fallback feature testing complete. All requested features verified working correctly. When camera fails (headless browser), 'Choisir depuis la galerie' becomes PRIMARY blue button with data-testid='gallery-btn-primary'. Retry camera button and close button visible. Hidden file input has accept='image/*' attribute.
passed_tests: Driver dashboard stats display (En cours, Livrées, Éco-score) - PASS
Driver dashboard delivery cards display properly - PASS
Photo button visible on in-transit delivery - PASS
Camera modal opens when clicking Photo button - PASS
Camera error state shows 'Caméra indisponible' message - PASS
Camera error state shows 'Aucune caméra détectée sur cet appareil' description - PASS
Gallery button 'Choisir depuis la galerie' is PRIMARY blue button when camera fails (data-testid='gallery-btn-primary') - PASS
Retry camera button 'Réessayer la caméra' visible (data-testid='retry-camera-btn') - PASS
Close button 'Fermer' visible below gallery button (data-testid='close-camera-btn') - PASS
Hidden file input exists with accept='image/*' attribute (data-testid='gallery-file-input') - PASS
Admin dashboard loads correctly with all navigation tabs - PASS (regression)
critical_code_review_comments: CameraModal: Proper implementation of gallery fallback - fileInputRef with hidden input, handleFileSelect for image processing
CameraModal: Correct conditional rendering - gallery-btn-primary shown when cameraError, gallery-btn-secondary shown when camera works
CameraModal: Image resizing to max 1280px dimension before base64 encoding for performance
CameraModal: Proper cleanup of camera stream tracks when switching to gallery or closing modal
context_for_next_testing_agent: Camera gallery fallback feature verified in iteration 12. CameraModal component (lines 534-797 in DriverDashboard.jsx) has: 1) fileInputRef for hidden file input, 2) handleFileSelect for processing gallery images, 3) cameraError state triggers gallery-btn-primary as main blue button, 4) Normal camera state shows take-photo-btn as primary and gallery-btn-secondary as subtle link. All data-testid attributes present and working.

gallery_fallback_feature.requirement_1: A 'Choisir depuis la galerie' button below 'Prendre une photo' - VERIFIED (gallery-btn-secondary when camera works)
gallery_fallback_feature.requirement_2: Using <input type='file' accept='image/*' /> - VERIFIED (data-testid='gallery-file-input' with accept='image/*')
gallery_fallback_feature.requirement_3: If camera access fails, gallery button becomes PRIMARY option - VERIFIED (gallery-btn-primary is blue button when cameraError state)

ui_elements_verified.gallery-btn-primary: Blue button 'Choisir depuis la galerie' - visible when camera fails
ui_elements_verified.gallery-btn-secondary: Subtle link 'Choisir depuis la galerie' - visible when camera works
ui_elements_verified.take-photo-btn: Blue button 'Prendre une photo' - visible when camera works
ui_elements_verified.retry-camera-btn: Outline button 'Réessayer la caméra' - visible when camera fails
ui_elements_verified.close-camera-btn: Outline button 'Fermer' - visible when camera fails
